sections.content: The click on the gray diamond's O center at (9, 49) worked - the gray diamond moved to the ring's position. Now I need to find the next object to click. Let me check the current state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after gray diamond moved
ascii_grid = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

print("=== Key colored centers ===")
for r in range(len(ascii_grid)):
    for c in range(len(ascii_grid[r])):
        ch = ascii_grid[r][c]
        if ch in 'MO':
            print(f"  ({r},{c}): {ch}")

# Check ring area
print("\n=== Ring area ===")
for r in range(14, 23):
    line = ascii_grid[r][53:62]
    if any(c != 'B' for c in line):
        print(f"Row {r}: {line}")

# Check orange object
print("\n=== Orange object ===")
for r in range(13, 20):
    line = ascii_grid[r][35:42]
    if any(c != 'B' for c in line):
        print(f"Row {r}: {line}")

# Check purple square
print("\n=== Purple square ===")
for r in range(37, 46):
    line = ascii_grid[r][43:52]
    if any(c != 'B' for c in line):
        print(f"Row {r}: {line}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
